title: A Visit to the Power Center
article_text: My mother and I visit the power center today. We watch a big deal about water power. The center has a test for new products. We see nothing special at first, but soon we find a base for a new machine. The machine can grow plants with water. I send a message to my friend to suggest a visit. The staff allow us to walk past the test area. They probably return to the center later. The power of water does not matter if we lose control. This visit is already a concern for my mother.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to make something go to someone'?
Which word means 'to say that someone should do something'?

image_prompts: A woman and her child walking into a modern power center building.
A group of people watching a large screen showing water and energy.
A scientist testing a new product in a lab with machines.
A person looking at a large empty room, then finding a metal base on the floor.
A machine with green plants growing inside, water dripping on them.
A person typing on a phone with a message bubble that says 'Visit here!'
Staff members standing by a door, letting a visitor walk through to a test area.
A person walking back into the power center building from outside.
A hand losing grip on a control panel near water pipes.
A mother looking worried while standing in the power center lobby.
